title: El espejo se mueve solo
caption: No mires demasiado de cerca... algo te está observando de vuelta. 🕯️👁️
promptImage: Cinematic wide shot in a dusty, dimly lit attic illuminated by a single flickering candle. Two characters, Leo in a blue sweater and Maya in a red jacket, stand before a large, ornate antique mirror. The reflection in the mirror shows them with a visible, creepy time delay, creating an eerie horror atmosphere. Hyper-realistic, high contrast, dark shadows.

characters.name: Leo
characters.description: blue sweater, nervous and timid

characters.name: Maya
characters.description: red jacket, brave and curious

chapters.prompt: Leo (trembling) and say: "Maya, look at this old mirror. It is very dark and dusty here in the attic." Maya (pointing to the glass) and respond: "Don't be afraid, Leo. It is just an old object from long ago. But wait... why does your reflection move so slowly? Look! You moved your hands, but the reflection stays there. This is very strange and very scary. I feel a lot of fear. Let's leave this dark attic right now!"

Leo (whispering) and say: "Maya, I don't like this place. This mirror looks creepy." Maya (leaning closer to the glass) and respond: "Calm down, Leo, it's just an antique mirror. Although... something is definitely off. Look closely at your reflection. It didn't blink when you did. It's as if the image is lagging behind reality. That's incredibly unsettling. I can't explain it, but the way the shadow moves independently of us is truly terrifying. We should probably get out of here before things get even worse."

Leo (shaking visibly) and say: "Maya, something is seriously wrong with this mirror. I've got a bad feeling about this." Maya (staring intensely at the glass) and respond: "Hold on, do you see that? It's not just my imagination. Your reflection... it's lagging behind your actual movements. You just turned your head, but the version in the mirror is still staring straight ahead at us. It’s like there’s a sinister delay between us and whatever is trapped inside that ancient, silvered glass. It’s absolutely bone-chilling and makes my skin crawl. We need to get out of this attic immediately before whatever is lurking in the reflection decides to step out into the real world."

title: Espías confunden al repartidor de pizza
caption: ¡Cuando el espionaje se encuentra con extra pepperoni! 🍕🕵️‍♂️ ¿Puedes notar la diferencia de nivel?
promptImage: Cinematic wide shot of a modern, sunlit cafe. A man in a sharp blue suit and a woman in a dark green jacket sit at a corner table, leaning in close with intense, suspicious expressions. High-end photography, dramatic shadows, shallow depth of field.

characters.name: Agent Blue
characters.description: wearing a blue suit, very intense and suspicious personality

characters.name: Agent Green
characters.description: wearing a green jacket, nervous and secretive personality

chapters.prompt: Agent Blue (looking around nervously) and say: "Is the delivery man here yet? I am very hungry for our mission. It is time to start." Agent Green (whispering loudly) and respond: "I do not see him anywhere. Did you bring the important documents inside the pizza box?" Agent Blue (checking his watch) and say: "No, I only have the pepperoni. Is the target ready to eat now?" Agent Green (looking suspicious) and respond: "The target is waiting at the park. Please, be very quiet!"

Agent Blue (glancing at the door) and say: "Have you seen the delivery guy yet? I'm starting to get really anxious about this meeting happening." Agent Green (adjusting her collar) and respond: "I haven't spotted anyone with a pizza box. Did you make sure the package was hidden properly?" Agent Blue (nodding intensely) and say: "Everything is inside the large crust. The contents are extremely sensitive, so please be careful when you open it." Agent Green (scanning the room) and respond: "Understood. Let's just hope he doesn't realize we're actually waiting for a handoff."

Agent Blue (eyeing the entrance) and say: "Any sign of the delivery guy? This whole thing is starting to feel a bit sketchy, don't you think?" Agent Green (leaning in close) and respond: "Nothing so far. I thought you said he'd show up at this exact time. Did something go sideways with the plan?" Agent Blue (tapping his fingers) and say: "Look, the pepperoni is just a cover. The real intel is tucked right under the cheese. Just play it cool when he arrives." Agent Green (scanning the crowd) and respond: "I'm trying, but if he walks in here with that much attitude, we're totally blown. Keep your eyes peeled for that thermal bag!"

title: El descubrimiento del huevo de dragón
caption: ¿Puedes entender a los exploradores? ¡Pon a prueba tu inglés de B1 a nivel nativo!
promptImage: Cinematic wide shot in a fantasy forest filled with giant glowing mushrooms, two explorers, one wearing blue clothing and one wearing green clothing, discovering a pulsating golden egg hidden under a large luminous leaf, magical atmosphere, highly detailed, 8k.

characters.name: Leo
characters.description: blue clothing, brave and curious explorer

characters.name: Mia
characters.description: green clothing, cautious and observant scholar

chapters.prompt: Leo (pointing at the ground) and say: "Look over there! What is that strange thing under this big leaf?" Mia (moving the leaf slowly) and respond: "I am not sure. It is glowing very brightly in the dark forest." Leo (leaning closer to the object) and say: "It is moving a little bit. Is it just a stone or something else?" Mia (looking quite worried now) and respond: "It looks like an egg. A very strange, pulsating egg! Be careful!"

Leo (kneeling down near the mushroom) and say: "Wait, do you see that strange light underneath this giant mushroom?" Mia (peering closely through the leaves) and respond: "It seems to be pulsing rhythmically. I've never seen anything quite like it before." Leo (reaching out his hand) and say: "It’s incredibly warm. It feels as if something living is trapped inside." Mia (stepping back slightly) and respond: "Be careful! If that turns out to be a real dragon egg, we might find ourselves in serious trouble."

Leo (brushing away the damp debris) and say: "Check this out! There's a strange, rhythmic glow emanating from beneath this thick foliage." Mia (squinting at the pulsating object) and respond: "Good grief, Leo. That thing is pulsing so intensely it's making my head spin." Leo (staring in absolute awe) and say: "It’s unmistakable. The heat radiating from under this leaf... it has to be a dragon egg, doesn't it?" Mia (biting her lip nervously) and respond: "Don't get your hopes up just yet. If we accidentally hatch something legendary, we'll be in way over our heads."

title: El misterio de la galleta desaparecida
caption: ¿Quién se robó el snack? 🍪 ¡Mira para descubrirlo! #AprenderInglés #Animación #Misterio
promptImage: Cinematic wide shot of two round, cute monsters in a vibrant, colorful kitchen. One blue monster wearing a yellow scarf looks panicked, while one pink monster wearing green overalls investigates an empty plate. High-quality 3ranimation style, bright lighting, delicious atmosphere.

characters.name: Grumble
characters.description: Blue round monster wearing a bright yellow scarf, very energetic and panicky personality.

characters.name: Puffy
characters.description: Pink round monster wearing green overalls, calm and observant detective-like personality.

chapters.prompt: Grumble (looking under the table, panicking): "Oh no! Where is my big chocolate cookie? I cannot find it anywhere!" Puffy (searching a large box, confused): "I do not see it here either. Is it inside this blue jar?" Grumble (sadly): "No, it is not there. Someone took my delicious snack!" Puffy (pointing to the floor): "Wait! Look! There are small crumbs on the kitchen floor. Let's follow them together!"

Grumble (searching frantically under the chairs): "This is unbelievable! My favorite chocolate cookie has completely disappeared from the plate!" Puffy (looking inside a kitchen cupboard): "Don't panic yet. I am checking all the cupboards right now, but I can't find anything unusual." Grumble (pointing at an empty plate with frustration): "Look at this plate! It is totally empty. Someone definitely stole it while we were sleeping!" Puffy (noticing something on the floor): "Wait a minute... do you see those tiny crumbs leading toward the window?"

Grumble (pacing around the kitchen): "I'm losing my mind! That cookie was the highlight of my morning, and now it's gone!" Puffy (rifling through a snack bin): "Calm down, man. It can't have just vanished into thin air. Let me check the pantry for any clues." Grumble (gesturing wildly at the empty jar): "I'm telling you, someone swiped it! The jar is bone dry!" Puffy (squinting at the floor): "Hang on... if you look closely, there's a trail of crumbs heading straight for the back door. We might have a thief on our hands!"

title: El misterio del reloj perdido
caption: ¿Puedes resolver el crimen? ¡Pon a prueba tu inglés de B1 a nivel nativo! 🕵️‍♂️🔍
promptImage: Cinematic noir film style, dark detective office, Venetian blind shadows across the room, smoke swirling in the air, rain hitting the window. Detective Miller in a grey trench coat leaning over a desk, interrogating Mr. Sterling in a dark blue suit who looks nervous. High contrast, moody lighting, 8k resolution.

characters.name: Detective Miller
characters.description: grey trench coat, stern and serious

characters.name: Mr. Sterling
characters.description: dark blue suit, nervous and shifty

chapters.prompt: Detective Miller (points at a photo) and say: "Where is the gold watch? I know you have it in your pocket." Mr. Sterling (looks away nervously) and respond: "I do not have the watch. It is not in my house. Please, listen to me. I am an innocent man. I was at home all night. The rain was very heavy. I did not see anyone. Why are you looking at me like this? I am very scared."

Detective Miller (leans forward into the light) and say: "Don't lie to me, Sterling. We found your fingerprints on the empty box." Mr. Sterling (wipes sweat from his forehead) and respond: "I can't explain that, Detective. I might have touched it yesterday, but that doesn't mean I stole it. Things are getting confusing. I was just visiting my friend when it disappeared. You can't prove anything else. This is all a huge misunderstanding, and you know it. Please, just let me go home."

Detective Miller (taps a cigarette on the desk) and say: "The evidence is mounting, Sterling. Your alibi is thinner than this cheap office smoke." Mr. Sterling (fidgets with his cufflink) and respond: "Look, Detective, you're twisting the facts to fit your narrative. Just because my prints were on that box doesn't imply any criminal intent. It's a complete coincidence! I was merely checking on a delivery, nothing more. You're chasing shadows in the rain, and frankly, it's getting exhausting. If you've got something substantial, show me, otherwise, quit wasting my precious time with these baseless accusations."

title: El secreto en el código
caption: ¿Puedes encontrar el error? Descubre la verdad detrás de las luces de neón. 🤖🌃 #Cyberpunk #AprenderInglés #Shorts
promptImage: Cinematic wide shot of a dark cyberpunk alleyway, heavy blue neon lighting, pouring rain, a hacker with a glowing tablet looking shocked at a mysterious companion in a metallic coat, high detail, hyper-realistic.

characters.name: Jax
characters.description: Black and neon green techwear jacket, paranoid and intense personality

characters.name: Kael
characters.description: Silver metallic coat, stoic and robotic personality

chapters.prompt: Jax (looking at his tablet) and say: "Kael, look at this code! There is a big mistake here." Kael (standing still in the rain) and respond: "I do not understand. What is the problem?" Jax (pointing at Kael's arm) and say: "Your arm... it is moving strangely. Is there a wire inside you?" Kael (staring blankly) and respond: "I am fine, Jax. Please, focus on the mission." Jax (shaking his head) and say: "No, you are not human!"

Jax (typing frantically) and say: "Kael, stop! I just found a massive error in the system logs." Kael (watching the rain) and respond: "It is probably just a glitch caused by the storm, Jax." Jax (grabbing Kael's wrist) and say: "It's not a glitch. Look at this data! Your biological readings are completely fake." Kael (pulling away slowly) and respond: "You shouldn't look at things that don't concern you." Jax (eyes wide with shock) and say: "Wait... your skin is cold. Are you actually an android?"

Jax (staring at the glowing screen) and say: "Kael, something is seriously off. This decrypted file reveals a massive system error." Kael (remaining motionless under the neon light) and respond: "You're overthinking it. The connection is just unstable because of the rain." Jax (noticing a flicker in Kael's eyes) and say: "Don't play dumb with me! I just tracked a synthetic heartbeat signature coming directly from your core." Kael (eyes glowing faintly blue) and respond: "Whatever you think you found, it doesn't change our objective." Jax (backing away in disbelief) and say: "My God... the person I trusted is nothing but a programmed machine!"

title: El secreto en el salón de baile
caption: ¿Puedes descifrar el mensaje oculto? 🕵️‍♂️✨ #AprenderInglés #DramaHistórico #LearnEnglish
promptImage: Cinematic wide shot of a luxurious Victorian ballroom, Lady Eleanor in deep blue velvet and Lord Julian in black silk waistcoat, whispering behind an ornate lace fan, warm candlelight, dramatic shadows, highly detailed historical setting.

characters.name: Lady Eleanor
characters.description: Deep blue velvet dress, mysterious and elegant personality

characters.name: Lord Julian
characters.description: Black silk waistcoat, intense and observant personality

chapters.prompt: Eleanor (hiding her face behind a lace fan) and say: "Good evening, Lord Julian. Do you have the important letter with you tonight?" Julian (looking around the crowded ballroom nervously) and respond: "Yes, I have it right here in my pocket. Is this place truly safe for us to talk?" Eleanor (smiling softly at him) and say: "The guards are not looking at us at this moment. Please, be very careful with our secret message. It is very dangerous."

Eleanor (fanning herself slowly while watching the crowd) and say: "It is quite a crowded ballroom tonight, isn't it, Julian? I truly hope you brought the documents we discussed." Julian (leaning closer to her, eyes scanning the room) and respond: "I have them, but the risk is getting much higher every day. Someone might notice us whispering like this in public." Eleanor (glancing nervously at a passing guard) and say: "Don't worry, no one is paying attention to us behind this fan. Just make sure the information reaches the contact by midnight without fail."

Eleanor (peering through the intricate lace of her fan) and say: "The atmosphere is quite stifling tonight, Julian. Tell me, has the package been secured exactly as we planned?" Julian (lowering his voice to a barely audible whisper) and respond: "It's tucked away safely, but the tension in the palace is becoming palpable. I fear our little rendezvous might be compromised if we linger too long in one spot." Eleanor (tightening her grip on the fan) and say: "We can't afford any blunders now. Ensure the instructions are delivered to the embassy before dawn. We must remain undetected at all costs, no matter how much the pressure mounts."

title: Duelo final al mediodía
caption: ¿Puedes sobrevivir a este duelo al mediodía? ¡Pon a prueba tu inglés de B1 a nivel nativo! 🌵🤠
promptImage: Cinematic wide shot of a dusty desert town street under a scorching sun, two outtleaws facing each other in a tense standoff, heat haze, hyper-realistic, western movie style, high contrast.

characters.name: Silas
characters.description: rugged outlaw wearing a brown leather vest and dusty hat, intense and vengeful

characters.name: Wyatt
characters.description: authoritative sheriff in a navy blue duster coat, calm and determined

chapters.prompt: Silas (pointing his gun) says: "Stop right there! I am not afraid of you." Wyatt (standing firm) responds: "Put your gun down, Silas. This is the end of the road." Silas (clenching his teeth) says: "No, it is not. I want my money back immediately!" Wyatt (looking at him) says: "The money is gone forever. You must leave this town today." Silas (reaching for his belt) says: "I will stay here and fight you right now!"

Silas (gripping his holster) says: "Don't even think about moving, Sheriff! I've had enough of your unfair rules." Wyatt (adjusting his hat) responds: "Look, Silas, you should just drop the gun and walk away before things get messy for everyone." Silas (spitting on the ground) says: "I won't back down this time. You took everything from me last winter!" Wyatt (staring intensely) says: "That was strictly business, not personal. Don't make a mistake you can't undo today." Silas (drawing his weapon slightly) says: "You'll see if I make a mistake!"

Silas (hand hovering over his revolver) says: "You think you can just push me around and get away with it, Wyatt? Not a chance in hell." Wyatt (eyes narrowed) responds: "Cut the crap, Silas. You're way out of your depth and every soul in this town knows it." Silas (clenching his fist) says: "I'm as much in line as anyone else. I ain't leaving without what's rightfully mine." Wyatt (standing dead still) says: "You're barkin' up the wrong tree if you think I'll let you cause a scene here." Silas (sneering) says: "Then let's settle this right now, once and for all!" Wyatt (coldly) says: "Fine. If it's blood you're after, don't say I didn't warn ya."

title: El secreto de la sombra revelado
caption: ¿Puedes confiar en tus aliados cuando su identidad es una mentira? 🎭✨ #AprenderInglés #Superhéroes #InglésB2
promptImage: Cinematic wide shot on a futuristic skyscraper rooftop at night, neon city lights in background, two superheroes facing each other, one in blue and silver armor looking shocked, the other in black and red stealth suit looking mysterious, dramatic lighting, hyper-realistic, 8k.

characters.name: Jax
characters.description: blue and silver armor, intense and shocked personality

characters.name: Nova
characters.description: black and red stealth suit, mysterious and calm personality

chapters.prompt: Jax (pointing at the mask) and say: "Wait! Why are you wearing that dark mask? I know your face. Is it really you, Leo?" Nova (looking down sadly) and respond: "You found my secret. Yes, I am the Shadow. Please do not be angry with me." Jax (walking closer with shock) and say: "But we are best friends! How can you lie to me like this? Everything feels different now. I cannot believe this truth!"

Jax (pointing at the mask) and say: "Stop right there! I just saw your insignia under that cape. Are you actually the Shadow?" Nova (looking away nervously) and respond: "I didn't want you to find out like this, Jax. It was a very difficult decision to make for us." Jax (stepping forward) and say: "You've been lying to me for months! If I had known the truth, things would be much different between us. How could you keep this secret from me?"

Jax (pointing at the mask) and say: "Hold up! Don't move an inch. I recognize that emblem anywhere. You're the Shadow, aren't you? Don't even try to deny it." Nova (sighing heavily) and respond: "I was hoping to keep this under wraps a bit longer, but there's no point in playing dumb now. It's out in the open." Jax (pacing back and forth) and say: "Are you kidding me? We've been side-by-side through everything, and you kept this whole thing from me? I feel completely blindsided by this sudden revelation!"

title: La oferta de trabajo que lo cambia todo
caption: ¿Puedes entender los tres niveles? ¡Pon a prueba tu inglés con este drama en cafetería! ☕️✨
promptImage: Cinematic medium shot of Leo in a blue shirt looking anxious and Sarah in a green sweater offering support, sitting at a wooden table in a busy, sunlit urban cafe, blurred background with people moving, highly detailed, 8k.

characters.name: Leo
characters.description: blue shirt, anxious and nervous personality

characters.name: Sarah
characters.description: green sweater, calm and supportive personality

chapters.prompt: Leo (looking at his hands) and say: "I am very nervous about the interview tomorrow." Sarah (smiling) and respond: "Don't worry! You are a great person and you are ready." Leo (taking a sip of coffee) and say: "But the job is very important for me. It is in London and I need this work to help my family." Sarah (touching his hand) and say: "You can do it! Just speak slowly and clearly during the meeting."

Leo (sighing deeply) and say: "I'm feeling really stressed about this interview. It's a huge opportunity." Sarah (leaning forward) and respond: "Calm down! You've been preparing for weeks, so you should be confident." Leo (looking around the cafe) and say: "I know, but the pressure is getting to me. If I get this position, my whole life will change." Sarah (smiling warmly) and say: "Just stay focused on your strengths. You are going to nail it!"

Leo (pacing slightly in his seat) and say: "I'm honestly losing my mind thinking about this interview tomorrow." Sarah (setting her cup down) and respond: "You're totally overthinking it, Leo. You've got all the credentials they're looking for." Leo (rubbing his temples) and say: "It’s not just that. The stakes are incredibly high. If I don't land this role, my entire career path might shift completely." Sarah (looking him in the eye) and say: "Look, you've worked your tail off for this opportunity. Don't let nerves get the better of you now."

title: El poder oscuro despierta ahora
caption: ¿Podrá Kael salvar a Lyra de las sombras? ¡Mira y mejora tu inglés! 🌸✨
promptImage: Cinematic anime wide shot, a lush cherry blossom field under a brilliant starry night sky. A young female warrior with glowing purple eyes and swirling dark energy around her, while a male companion in white robes reaches out to her in desperation. Floating petals, high contrast, epic atmosphere.

characters.name: Lyra
characters.description: black and purple armor, intense and struggling

characters.name: Kael
characters.description: white and blue robes, calm and protective

chapters.prompt: Kael (reaching out) and say: "Lyra, stop! Please listen to me right now. You are in danger." Lyra (clutching her head) and say: "I cannot stop! It is too strong. I feel a very dark power growing inside me." Kael (looking at her) and respond: "Do not let it take you away from us. We can find a way together. Please, stay with me!" Lyra (eyes glowing purple) and say: "It is too late for that. The power is here now."

Kael (grabbing her hand) and say: "Lyra, you have to fight it! Don't let this darkness take over your heart." Lyra (shaking with energy) and say: "I am trying so hard, but I can't hold it back anymore. It feels like something is breaking inside me!" Kael (looking worriedly) and respond: "We can find a way to fix this if you just stay calm. Don't let yourself get lost in the shadows!" Lyra (eyes glowing intensely) and say: "It's too late, Kael. The forbidden power has already awakened."

Kael (desperately pulling her back) and say: "Lyra, snap out of it! You're losing control and you're going to end up hurting someone!" Lyra (struggling against the shadows) and say: "I'm fighting it with everything I've got, but this shadow is consuming me from the inside out!" Kael (voice trembling) and respond: "There has to be a way to suppress this surge! Don't let this energy dictate your destiny or destroy everything we've built!" Lyra (releasing a wave of dark energy) and say: "It's no use, Kael. The seal is broken and there's no turning back now. This darkness is far too potent to contain."
